_instructions: Fill in after each match. home_goals_90/away_goals_90 are the score after 90 minutes of regulation ONLY (before extra time). 'advanced' is the team that progressed (or won, for TPP/F), needed for the +1 advance bonus. Leave null until known; score.py skips null matches. Add a source URL in 'source' for the record.

QF3.source: England won 2-1 in extra time (Bellingham 2); 1-1 after 90'. https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/live/world-cup-bracket-schedule-scores-results-live-updates-quarterfinals-203257966.html

QF4.source: Argentina won 3-1 in extra time (Alvarez 112', Martinez); 1-1 after 90'. https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/live/world-cup-bracket-schedule-scores-results-live-updates-quarterfinals-203257966.html

SF2.source: Argentina won 2-1 in regulation, two late goals. https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/article/world-cup-semifinals-bracket-full-schedule-matchups-and-path-to-the-final-164942403.html

TPP.source: England won 6-4 in regulation (Saka 3, Bellingham 90+8; Mbappe 2 for France); stoppage-time goals count in the 90' score, no extra time. https://www.espn.com/soccer/match/_/gameId/760516/england-france
